rationale: Educ. Code §46.033 governs bond eligibility based on payment history and state assistance status. It does not reference the homestead exemption amount or Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct textual conflict exists; any impact is indirect via reduced local tax revenue affecting debt service calculations.
quote: the district does not receive state assistance under Subchapter A for payment of the principal and interest on the bonds.
_note: No direct conflict. Increasing the homestead exemption could indirectly affect school district property tax revenue and debt service collections, but §46.033 contains no provision tied to the exemption amount.
